message:
Add endpoint resolution, graph adjacency helpers, and leaf_subgraphs query

Introduces IrEndpoint::resolved_node_id for port-aware node resolution,
plus incident/outgoing/incoming edge queries and neighbor traversal on
MermaidDiagramIr. Also adds leaf_subgraphs filter with tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
